title: villaria lanceolata
intro: Villaria lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaf villaria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. The lance-leaf villaria is a shrub with lance-shaped leaves, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Villaria lanceolata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to aid in the relief of coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems.
